title: OCR Pipeline Fixes: Lossless Debug Images + Context Menu Title Band OCR

stories.title: Lossless WebP debug images in inventory_vision.py
acceptanceCriteria: Line 926 of inventory_vision.py uses [cv2.IMWRITE_WEBP_QUALITY, 101] instead of 80
ruff check src/ tests/ reports no errors in inventory_vision.py

stories.title: Lossless WebP corpus images in failure_corpus.py
acceptanceCriteria: Line 216 of failure_corpus.py uses [cv2.IMWRITE_WEBP_QUALITY, 101] instead of 80
ruff check src/ tests/ reports no errors in failure_corpus.py

stories.title: Add _CTX_MENU_TITLE_HEIGHT_REL constant
acceptanceCriteria: ruff and basedpyright report no new errors

stories.title: Title-band OCR pass in ocr_context_menu
acceptanceCriteria: ocr_context_menu calls ocr_title_strip on the top _CTX_MENU_TITLE_HEIGHT_REL fraction before isolate_menu_panel
global _last_roi_hash, _last_ocr_result declared at top of ocr_context_menu for cache save/restore
On title_result.item_name match, returns InfoboxOcrResult with source='context_menu'
If title-band OCR yields no match, existing menu-text path runs unchanged as fallback
ruff check and basedpyright report no new errors
